hooks.command: powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$f = $env:TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH; if ($f -match '\.vue$') { $c = Get-Content $f -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $issues = @(); if ($c -match 'import axios') { $issues += 'AXIOS directo detectado - usar service layer (@/config/api)' }; if ($c -match 'import api from') { $issues += 'API import en view/component - usar store, no service directo' }; if ($c -match 'JSON\.parse') { $issues += 'JSON.parse en view - mover a store o service' }; if ($c -match 'animate\(.*width|animate\(.*height|gsap\.to.*width|gsap\.to.*height') { $issues += 'GSAP animando layout properties - usar solo transform/opacity' }; if ($c -match 'x-client.*[a-z]+-[a-z]+') { $val = $Matches[0]; if ($val -notmatch 'VITE_CLIENT_SLUG') { $issues += \"Posible slug hardcodeado: $val - usar VITE_CLIENT_SLUG\" } }; if ($issues.Count -gt 0) { Write-Output ''; Write-Output '[PEGASUZ CHECK]'; $issues | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \"  x $_\" } } }"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "$f = $env:TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH; if ($f -match '\.js$' -and $f -match 'stores') { $c = Get-Content $f -Raw -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; $issues = @(); if ($c -match 'import api from') { $issues += 'Store importa API directo - debe importar desde service' }; if ($c -match 'api\.get|api\.post') { $issues += 'Store hace HTTP calls - delegar a service layer' }; if ($issues.Count -gt 0) { Write-Output ''; Write-Output '[BINDING CHECK]'; $issues | ForEach-Object { Write-Output \"  x $_\" } } }"

powershell.exe -NoProfile -Command "Write-Output ''; Write-Output '[V3 CHECKLIST] Before closing:'; Write-Output '  - Loading + error states implemented?'; Write-Output '  - prefers-reduced-motion respected in EVERY animated component?'; Write-Output '  - GSAP cleanup (ctx?.revert()) in EVERY component?'; Write-Output '  - Lenis smooth scroll initialized?'; Write-Output '  - Custom cursor with 3+ states?'; Write-Output '  - Magnetic buttons on all CTAs?'; Write-Output '  - Page transitions implemented?'; Write-Output '  - Atmospheric canvas present?'; Write-Output '  - Motion variety: no consecutive sections share technique?'; Write-Output '  - Foundation docs complete (design-brief, content-brief, page-plans, motion-spec)?'; Write-Output '  - 12-point creative validation passed?'"
